_comment: Tracked, pure-data app configuration. Settings exposed in the dashboard UI (OOR threshold, slippage, intervals, etc.) live in app-config/app-defaults-for-user-configurable/bot-config-defaults.json instead, with per-install operator overrides in app-config/user-configurable/bot-config-defaults.json and per-position runtime overrides in app-config/user-configurable/bot-config.json.

tx._comment: TX recovery pipeline timing, cross-chain. speedupSec: after this many seconds of the original TX not confirming, submit a same-nonce replacement with 1.5x gas (Phase 2 of _waitOrSpeedUp). deadlineSec: on-chain contract deadline (`require(block.timestamp <= deadline)`) stamped into removeLiquidity / swap / mint calldata. cancelToDeadlineMultiple: the bot's per-TX give-up timer (TX_CANCEL_SEC in code) is derived as deadlineSec × cancelToDeadlineMultiple — how much total time to wait before sending a 0-PLS self-transfer cancel at the stuck nonce. Rule of thumb: set the multiple ≥ 4 so a slow-chain retry cycle can complete before the bot gives up on the nonce. See src/config.js for the derivation and src/rebalancer-pools.js for the deadline enforcement.

aggregator._comment: AGGREGATOR_API_KEY is a public 0x-api-key embedded in 9mm's product (required for valid Aggregator calldata) — not a user-owned credential. It lives here, not in api-keys.json, because encrypting it would force every operator to re-enter it, which is not their job. Override per-deployment via AGGREGATOR_URL / AGGREGATOR_API_KEY env vars if needed.
